CoreRelm
Table of Contents

Class RelmModel

Namespace
CoreRelm.Models
Assembly
CoreRelm.dll

Represents a base model for entities in the Relm framework, providing core attributes and functionality for data manipulation, database operations, and DTO generation.

[RelmFunction("uuid_v4", "\r\n        -- 16 cryptographically strong random bytes\r\n        DECLARE b BINARY(16);\r\n        SET b = RANDOM_BYTES(16);\r\n\r\n        -- Set version to 4 (0100xxxx) in byte 7 (1-indexed)\r\n        SET b = INSERT(b, 7, 1, CHAR((ASCII(SUBSTR(b, 7, 1)) & 15) | 64 USING latin1));\r\n\r\n        -- Set variant to RFC 4122 (10xxxxxx) in byte 9\r\n        SET b = INSERT(b, 9, 1, CHAR((ASCII(SUBSTR(b, 9, 1)) & 63) | 128 USING latin1));\r\n\r\n        -- Format as 8-4-4-4-12\r\n        RETURN LOWER(CONCAT(\r\n            HEX(SUBSTR(b,  1, 4)), '-',\r\n            HEX(SUBSTR(b,  5, 2)), '-',\r\n            HEX(SUBSTR(b,  7, 2)), '-',\r\n            HEX(SUBSTR(b,  9, 2)), '-',\r\n            HEX(SUBSTR(b, 11, 6))\r\n        ));", "CHAR", 36, "Generates a version 4 UUID as a string in the format 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx', where 'x' is any hexadecimal digit and 'y' is one of 8, 9, A, or B.", null, false, StoredProcedures.ProcedureDataAccess.NoSql, SecurityEnums.SqlSecurityLevel.Invoker)]
[RelmTrigger(Triggers.TriggerTime.BEFORE, Triggers.TriggerEvent.INSERT, "\r\n    BEGIN\r\n        IF NEW.InternalId IS NULL OR NEW.InternalId = '' THEN\r\n            SET NEW.InternalId = uuid_v4();\r\n        END IF;\r\n    END", null, Triggers.TriggerOrdering.FOLLOWS, null)]
public class RelmModel : RelmModelClean, IRelmModel, IRelmModelClean

ModelExtensions.LoadForeignKeyField<T, R, S>(T, RelmContextOptions, Expression<Func<T, R>>, IRelmDataLoader<S>)
ModelExtensions.LoadForeignKeyField<T, R, S>(T, RelmContextOptions, Expression<Func<T, R>>, IRelmDataLoader<S>, Expression<Func<R, object>>)

Remarks

The RelmModel class serves as a foundational class for entities, offering features such as:

  • Core attributes like Id, Active, InternalId, CreateDate, and LastUpdated.
  • Support for resetting attributes to default values using ResetCoreAttributes(bool, bool).
  • Data population from database rows via ResetWithData(DataRow, string?).
  • Bulk database write operations through various WriteToDatabase overloads.
  • Dynamic Data Transfer Object (DTO) generation with GenerateDTO.
This class is designed to be extended by specific entity types and provides a flexible foundation for working with relational data in the Relm framework.

Constructors

RelmModel()

Initializes a new instance of the RelmModel class.

public RelmModel()

Remarks

This constructor initializes the core attributes of the model by invoking the ResetCoreAttributes(bool, bool) method.

RelmModel(IRelmModel)

Initializes a new instance of the RelmModel class by copying the values from the specified source model.

public RelmModel(IRelmModel fromModel)

Parameters

fromModel IRelmModel

The source model from which to copy property values. This parameter cannot be null.

Remarks

This constructor copies the Id, Active, InternalId, CreateDate, and LastUpdated properties from the provided model. Use this constructor to create a new RelmModel instance that mirrors the state of an existing IRelmModel.

RelmModel(DataRow, string?)

Initializes a new instance of the RelmModel class using the specified data row and an optional alternate table name.

public RelmModel(DataRow modelData, string? alternateTableName = null)

Parameters

modelData DataRow

The DataRow containing the model data. This parameter cannot be null.

alternateTableName string

An optional string representing an alternate table name. If provided, it will be used instead of the default table name.

Remarks

This constructor throws an ArgumentNullException if modelData is null, ensuring that valid data is provided for model initialization.

Properties

Active

Gets or sets a value indicating whether the entity is active.

[RelmColumn(null, MySqlDbType.VarChar, null, 1, null, false, false, false, false, "1", false, false)]
public bool Active { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

CreateDate

Gets or sets the creation date and time of the entity.

[RelmColumn(null, MySqlDbType.VarChar, null, -1, null, false, false, false, false, "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP", false, false)]
public DateTime CreateDate { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Id

Gets or sets the unique auto-number row identifier for the entity.

[RelmColumn(null, MySqlDbType.VarChar, null, -1, null, false, true, true, false, null, false, false)]
public long? Id { get; set; }

Property Value

long?

InternalId

Gets or sets the unique internal identifier for the entity.

[RelmIndex(null, Indexes.IndexType.UNIQUE, -1, null, null, Indexes.Visibility.None, null, null, Indexes.Algorithm.None, Indexes.LockOption.None)]
[RelmColumn(null, MySqlDbType.VarChar, null, 45, null, false, false, false, false, null, false, false)]
public string? InternalId { get; set; }

Property Value

string

LastUpdated

Gets or sets the timestamp of the last update.

[RelmColumn(null, MySqlDbType.VarChar, null, -1, null, false, false, false, false, "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP", false, false)]
public DateTime LastUpdated { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Methods

ResetCoreAttributes(bool, bool)

Resets the core attributes of the model to their default values.

public IRelmModel ResetCoreAttributes(bool nullInternalId = false, bool resetCreateDate = true)

Parameters

nullInternalId bool

If true, sets the internal ID to null; otherwise, generates a new unique identifier.

resetCreateDate bool

If true, resets the creation date to the current date and time.

Returns

IRelmModel

The current instance of the model with updated core attributes.

ResetWithData(DataRow, string?)

Resets the model's attributes using the specified data row, optionally using an alternate table name.

public override IRelmModel ResetWithData(DataRow modelData, string? alternateTableName = null)

Parameters

modelData DataRow

The data row containing the values to apply to the model. Cannot be null.

alternateTableName string

An optional alternate table name to use when resetting the model. If null, the default table name is used.

Returns

IRelmModel

An instance of IRelmModel representing the model after the reset operation.

Remarks

This method resets core attributes before delegating to the base implementation. Use this method to update the model's state from a data source.
